title: Indulgent Polish Dijon Mustard Bisque
description: A rich and creamy soup featuring Polish flavors and dijon mustard, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut7 8e until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add 4 cups of chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth, or allow it to cool and puree in a blender.
Return the soup to the saucepan and stir in 2 tablespoons of dijon mustard and 1 teaspoon of honey.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Heat the bisque in a bain-marie by placing the saucepan in a larger pot of simmering water, and stir occasionally until heated through.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
This soup can be refrigerated for up to 3 days or frozen for up to 2 months.
Serve with crusty bread or crackers for dipping, if desired.
